name: Screaming Frog
description:
How does Screaming Frog help agencies?

Screaming Frog has an array of agency services, right from search engine marketing to digital copywriting and SEO tools that makes it a go-to for agencies, providing everything under a single platform. 

Source: ScreamingFrog

Features 

  • Offers fully integrated search engine marketing services to help your business grow and rank better on SERPs
  • Helps you achieve sustainable and high rankings on search engines via technical tweaks, on-site content, and link-building 
  • Offers an SEO spider tool that helps you with technical SEO
  • They have a team of copywriters who create engaging, keyword-optimized blogs and copies. 
  • Comes with a digital PR team that helps you earn top-tier coverage and links from websites and authoritative websites. 
  • Has a Reactive PR team that helps you build brand awareness and grow your authority. 
  • Does Paid Advertising for social media across various major platforms

Pros 

  • Great with auditing and scraping your website with a website crawler that helps you improve your onsite SEO. 

Cons

  • The annual upfront payment is a little inconvenient for a lot of users to pay
  • The user interface can improve and be made better

Pricing 

Priced at $199 Per Month
